title: rosa × polliniana var. decipiens
intro: Rosa × polliniana var. decipiens is a type of hybrid rose plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is also known as the 'Alba' or 'White Rose', which is a popular ornamental plant used in gardens for its fragrant white blooms and attractive foliage. The medicinal properties of Rosa × polliniana var. decipiens include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. Rosa × polliniana var. decipiens is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and soothe skin irritations, offering health benefits that range from anxiety relief to wound healing.
